channel.title: 194th Semiannual General Conference

itunes:owner.itunes:name: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

item.title: Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers
item.description:
Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers by Presented by President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
undefined
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Presented by President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: The Triumph of Hope
item.description:
The Triumph of Hope by Elder Neil L. Andersen, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Hope is a living gift, a gift that grows as we increase our faith in Jesus Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Neil L. Andersen, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Live Up to Your Privileges
item.description:
Live Up to Your Privileges by President Emily Belle Freeman, Young Women General President given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Learn how priesthood ordinances and covenant promises will allow God’s power to flow into your life.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Emily Belle Freeman, Young Women General President

item.title: God’s Favourite
item.description:
God’s Favourite by Elder Karl D. Hirst, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Being filled with God’s love shields us in life’s storms but also makes the happy moments happier.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Karl D. Hirst, Of the Seventy

item.title: “This Is My Gospel”—“This Is My Church”
item.description:
“This Is My Gospel”—“This Is My Church” by Elder Dale G. Renlund, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
This is the Savior’s gospel, and this is His Church (see ; ; ). The combination of the two is powerful and transformative.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Dale G. Renlund, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Trusting Our Father
item.description:
Trusting Our Father by Elder David P. Homer, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
God trusts us to make many important decisions, and in all matters He asks us to trust Him.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder David P. Homer, Of the Seventy

item.title: God Loves All His Children
item.description:
God Loves All His Children by Elder Gregorio E. Casillas, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Jesus Christ is always calling upon us, and He uses us, His ordinary servants, to help bring His children to Him.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gregorio E. Casillas, Of the Seventy

item.title: Following Christ
item.description:
Following Christ by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Saturday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
As followers of Christ, we teach and testify of Jesus Christ, our Perfect Role Model. So let us follow Him by forgoing contention.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Burying Our Weapons of Rebellion
item.description:
Burying Our Weapons of Rebellion by Elder D. Todd Christofferson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
May we bury—very, very deep—any element of rebellion against God in our lives and replace it with a willing heart and a willing mind.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder D. Todd Christofferson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Bonded to Jesus Christ: Becoming the Salt of the Earth
item.description:
Bonded to Jesus Christ: Becoming the Salt of the Earth by Elder José A. Teixeira, Of the Presidency of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
As we remain bonded to the Lord, our lives will naturally reflect His light, and we will become the salt of the earth.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder José A. Teixeira, Of the Presidency of the Seventy

item.title: His Hand Ready to Help Us
item.description:
His Hand Ready to Help Us by Elder Juan Pablo Villar, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
As we reach out to Jesus Christ in faith, He will always be there.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Juan Pablo Villar, Of the Seventy

item.title: Welcome to the Church of Joy
item.description:
Welcome to the Church of Joy by Elder Patrick Kearon, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Because of the redeeming life and mission of our Saviour, Jesus Christ, we can—and should—be the most joyful people on earth!
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Patrick Kearon, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: “Ye Are My Friends”
item.description:
“Ye Are My Friends” by Elder David L. Buckner, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
The Savior’s declaration “ye are my friends” is a clarion call to build higher and holier relationships among all of God’s children.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder David L. Buckner, Of the Seventy

item.title: Be Thou Clean
item.description:
Be Thou Clean by Elder D. Martin Goury, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Daily repentance allows us to discern the guidance of the Lord through the Holy Ghost.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder D. Martin Goury, Of the Seventy

item.title: The Wind Did Never Cease to Blow
item.description:
The Wind Did Never Cease to Blow by Elder Aroldo B. Cavalcante, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
We can help others progress in their journey to receive God’s blessings.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Aroldo B. Cavalcante, Of the Seventy

item.title: Aligning Our Will with His
item.description:
Aligning Our Will with His by Elder Ulisses Soares, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Following the Lord’s will in our life will enable us to find the most precious pearl in the world—the kingdom of heaven.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ulisses Soares, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Holiness to the Lord in Everyday Life
item.description:
Holiness to the Lord in Everyday Life by Elder Gerrit W. Gong, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Evening session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Holiness to the Lord makes daily living sacred. It draws us closer and happier to the Lord and each other.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gerrit W. Gong, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: The Joy of Our Redemption
item.description:
The Joy of Our Redemption by Sister Kristin M. Yee, Second Counselor in the Relief Society General Presidency given in the Saturday Evening session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Jesus Christ’s love and power can save each of us from our mistakes, weaknesses, and sins and help us to become something more.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Sister Kristin M. Yee, Second Counselor in the Relief Society General Presidency

item.title: The Man Who Communed with Jehovah
item.description:
The Man Who Communed with Jehovah by Elder Kyle S. McKay, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Evening session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Joseph Smith was “blessed to open the last dispensation,” and we are blessed that he did.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Kyle S. McKay, Of the Seventy

item.title: Embrace the Lord’s Gift of Repentance
item.description:
Embrace the Lord’s Gift of Repentance by Elder Jorge M. Alvarado, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Evening session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Let us not wait for things to get hard before turning to God. Let us not wait until the end of our mortal lives to truly repent.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Jorge M. Alvarado, Of the Seventy

item.title: In the Space of Not Many Years
item.description:
In the Space of Not Many Years by Elder David A. Bednar, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Evening session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
If we are not faithful and obedient, we can transform the God-given blessing of prosperity into a prideful curse that diverts and distracts us.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder David A. Bednar, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: “I Am He”
item.description:
“I Am He” by President Jeffrey R. Holland, Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Christ’s charity—evident in complete loyalty to divine will—persisted and continues to persist.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Jeffrey R. Holland, Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Seeking Answers to Spiritual Questions
item.description:
Seeking Answers to Spiritual Questions by Sister Tracy Y. Browning, Second Counselor in the Primary General Presidency given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Our sincere gospel questions can provide Heavenly Father and Jesus Christ with opportunities to help us grow.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Sister Tracy Y. Browning, Second Counselor in the Primary General Presidency

item.title: Mortality Works!
item.description:
Mortality Works! by Elder Brook P. Hales, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Despite the challenges we all face, our loving Heavenly Father has designed the plan of happiness such that we are not destined to fail.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Brook P. Hales, Of the Seventy

item.title: Seek Him with All Your Heart
item.description:
Seek Him with All Your Heart by Bishop L. Todd Budge, Second Counselor in the Presiding Bishopric given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
If Jesus Christ sought quiet time to commune with God and to be strengthened by Him, it would be wise for us to do the same.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Bishop L. Todd Budge, Second Counselor in the Presiding Bishopric

item.title: Days Never to Be Forgotten
item.description:
Days Never to Be Forgotten by Elder Gary E. Stevenson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Upcoming moments will provide members of the Church everywhere with increased opportunities to share the glad tidings of the gospel of Jesus Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gary E. Stevenson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: O Youth of the Noble Birthright
item.description:
O Youth of the Noble Birthright by Brother Bradley R. Wilcox, First Counselor in the Young Men General Presidency given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
God trusts you, the children of the covenant, to help with His work of bringing all His children safely home to Him.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Brother Bradley R. Wilcox, First Counselor in the Young Men General Presidency

item.title: Simple Is the Doctrine of Jesus Christ
item.description:
Simple Is the Doctrine of Jesus Christ by President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Sunday Morning session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
I bear witness of the sacred work of teaching Heavenly Father’s children the simple doctrine of Jesus Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Nourish the Roots, and the Branches Will Grow
item.description:
Nourish the Roots, and the Branches Will Grow by Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
The branches of your testimony will draw strength from your deepening faith in Heavenly Father and His Beloved Son.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: The Words of Christ and the Holy Ghost Will Lead Us to the Truth
item.description:
The Words of Christ and the Holy Ghost Will Lead Us to the Truth by Elder Takashi Wada, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Knowing this incredible plan will help us know we are children of God and we can become like Him.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Takashi Wada, Of the Seventy

item.title: “Behold I Am the Light Which Ye Shall Hold Up”
item.description:
“Behold I Am the Light Which Ye Shall Hold Up” by Elder Ronald A. Rasband, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
We hold up the Lord’s light when we hold fast to our covenants and when we support our living prophet.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ronald A. Rasband, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Sacred Scriptures—the Foundations of Faith
item.description:
Sacred Scriptures—the Foundations of Faith by Elder Quentin L. Cook, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
We cannot underestimate the significance of sacred scriptures both in conversions and in remaining faithful in the gospel.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Quentin L. Cook, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Sons and Daughters of God
item.description:
Sons and Daughters of God by Elder Rubén V. Alliaud, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
We truly believe that we are all literally the children of God, and because of that, we have the potential to become like Him.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Rubén V. Alliaud, Of the Seventy

item.title: Focus on Jesus Christ and His Gospel
item.description:
Focus on Jesus Christ and His Gospel by Elder I. Raymond Egbo, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
When we ignore the distractions of the world and focus on Christ and His gospel, we are guaranteed success.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder I. Raymond Egbo, Of the Seventy

item.title: The Lord Jesus Christ Will Come Again
item.description:
The Lord Jesus Christ Will Come Again by President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 194th Semiannual General Conference on Mon Sep 30 2024
Now is the time for you and for me to prepare for the Second Coming of our Lord and Savior, Jesus the Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
